metadata.document_title: Independent Auditors' Report and Financial Statements for the year ended 07 July 2022

auditor.firm_name: Elias Zeleke Chartered Certified Accountants and Certified Audit Firm

source.notes: Source PDF appears to be scanned images; extracted values were transcribed from the rendered pages.

audit_report.opinion_summary: The auditor expressed a qualified opinion: except for the effects of the matters described in the Basis for Qualified Opinion, the financial statements present a true and fair view of the Institute's financial position as of 07 July 2022 and its financial performance and cash flows for the year then ended.

basis_for_qualified_opinion.topic: Revenue recognition of advances / undelivered sales
basis_for_qualified_opinion.summary: Advance collected was treated as sales and undelivered sales were recorded against cost of sales. Under IFRS 15, revenue should be recognized when performance obligations are satisfied; the auditor was not satisfied that reported sales and cost of sales were not overstated.

basis_for_qualified_opinion.topic: Inventory costing / absorption of production costs
basis_for_qualified_opinion.summary: Direct and indirect costs (materials, labor, and overhead) were not absorbed into inventory cost; vaccines inventory was not valued using standard costing. Under IAS 2, production costs should be absorbed into inventory cost; the auditor was not satisfied that inventory and cost of sales balances were fairly stated.

basis_for_qualified_opinion.topic: Sales variance between VAT declarations and Z-report register

amounts_etb.label: Difference between VAT declaration and Z report (Z report higher)

basis_for_qualified_opinion.summary: Total sales per monthly VAT declarations and annual sales register machine (Z report) differed; the Z report balance was higher. The report notes non-compliance with tax laws may lead to penalties.

data_quality_notes: The 2022 'Increase in inventories' figure was not clearly legible in the scan; it was derived from the displayed subtotal ('Cash generated from operations') and other visible lines in the working-capital section.
